title: sideritis hirsuta var. luxurians
intro: Sideritis hirsuta var. luxurians, also known as Greek mountain tea or mountain tea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Sideritis and is native to the Mediterranean region. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sideritis hirsuta var. luxurians include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make infusions, tinctures, and other preparations.
